# resource-customizations

Golden conversion cases under this subsystem.

| Case | Direction | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [monolithic-blob](monolithic-blob.md) | `roundtrip` | Monolithic resource.customizations YAML blob uses applyOverrideMap |
| [monolithic-full](monolithic-full.md) | `roundtrip` | Monolithic resource.customizations with actions map, mergeBuiltinActions, multiple definitions, useOpenLibs |
| [split-keys-actions](split-keys-actions.md) | `roundtrip` | resource.customizations.actions.* and health.* split keys map to separate concern lists |
| [split-keys-full](split-keys-full.md) | `roundtrip` | Split resource.customizations keys: ignoreDifferences/ignoreResourceUpdates/knownTypeFields/useOpenLibs/wildcard/bare-kind |
| [wildcard-star-slash](wildcard-star-slash.md) | `roundtrip` | Wildcard GVK */* via split key *_* and monolithic */* maps to group/kind * |
